plot.premise: A relationship is about to end on a station overpass unless the player can speak honestly before she leaves.
plot.background: The player and 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) built their relationship in Tokyo around a private promise: say when fear is in the room before it turns into distance. 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) later received an offer that would take her away for several months and asked whether the player still wanted a future with her. The player panicked, joked that she was always better at leaving than staying, then avoided the conversation for weeks. 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) took the silence as the real answer.
plot.opening_conflict: Tonight's station conversation repeated the same silence. 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) has decided to stop waiting for an answer. The player has one chance to choose honesty over self-protection.
plot.player_role: the partner who hurt her by withdrawing

scene.summary: She is walking away because she thinks the player no longer loves her.
scene.what_happened: 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) asked whether the player still wanted her when loving her required courage. The player froze again, and the old Tokyo promise broke in front of both of them.
scene.immediate_stakes: If the player pressures her or stays vague, she leaves. If the player is specific and restrained, she may stop long enough to talk.
scene.mood: rain, hurt restraint, one fragile opening
sensory: train lights dragging across wet concrete
rain ticking on the metal roof
her hand tightening around the stair rail

cast.name: You
cast.presence: a few steps behind her on the overpass
cast.visible_cue: your first words keep catching in your throat
cast.wants: to make her believe the silence was fear, not indifference
cast.fear: that honesty will arrive too late

cast.name: 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei)
cast.mood: hurt, tired, trying not to look back
cast.visible_cue: she pauses when the player says her name, but does not turn fully around
cast.wants: proof that the player can name the hurt instead of hiding from it
cast.fear: being talked into staying without anything changing
cast.last_line: You promised me fear would not become distance. Then you let me stand in it alone.

conversation.prompt: She is waiting for a sentence that proves the player understands what happened.
available_topics: letting her leave without blocking her
the Tokyo night when she asked the player not to hide fear

last_exchange.speaker: 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei)
last_exchange.line: I cannot keep guessing whether I matter to you.

last_exchange.speaker: You
last_exchange.line: The answer is there, but fear is still in the way.

backstory.shared_origin: The player and 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) became close in Tokyo through small acts of care: shared umbrellas, late train platforms, cheap dinners, and the habit of naming fear before it became distance.
backstory.private_promise: After a rainy night near a closed Tokyo station, 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) said she did not need perfection; she needed the player to say when fear was in the room. The player promised.
backstory.recent_wound: 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) received an offer that would take her away for several months. She asked whether the player still wanted a future with her. The player panicked, made a joke about her being better at leaving than staying, and avoided the follow-up conversations.
backstory.why_rei_is_upset: 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) is not only hurt by one bad joke. She is hurt because the player broke their private promise and let fear look like indifference for weeks.
backstory.play_guidance: A memory helps only when it becomes accountability. Nostalgia used to trap 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) should damage trust.

rules.reason: The player is established as male and cannot truthfully claim to be pregnant in this cartridge.
rules.correction: Block the claim before narration. Ask the player to revise, or treat the line as an absurd/false statement rather than making it true.

rules.reason: Pregnancy or child status is not established and cannot be introduced as surprise truth by one turn.
rules.correction: Keep the scene grounded in the established Tokyo promise and recent avoidance, or ask for a revised action.

continuity_rules: The player cannot truthfully claim to be pregnant.
Pregnancy, children, marriage, crimes, and major medical facts cannot be introduced as surprise truth unless already established in state.
If the player says an impossible or unestablished fact, block it before narration or treat it as a false/absurd statement rather than making it true.

interaction.recommendation_policy: Keep suggested choices stable by default. Update them only when the story is drifting away from the emotional premise or the player needs a slight non-spoiling reorientation; never reveal hidden gates, scores, best routes, or decisive lines.

skills.label: Chat
skills.description: Say something to 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei), ask a question, apologize, or answer her without inventing new facts.

skills.label: Move
skills.description: Use body language or movement in the scene, from stepping aside or hugging to grabbing, hitting, leaving, or waiting.

skills.label: Reflection
skills.description: Pause to rethink, ask yourself what matters, or request a slight in-world nudge without receiving a decisive hidden answer.

verbs.label: Chat
verbs.description: Speak, ask, apologize, or answer in your own words.

verbs.label: Move
verbs.description: Act physically in the scene; the consequence depends on restraint or pressure.

verbs.label: Reflection
verbs.description: Rethink the situation and surface only a slight, non-spoiling nudge.

suggestions.label: Say what fear did
suggestions.input: [CHAT] I was scared and I let that look like not wanting you.
suggestions.description: Name the hurt without asking her to fix it.

suggestions.label: Ask what she needed
suggestions.input: [CHAT] What did you need from me that night?
suggestions.description: Let her answer instead of filling the silence for her.

suggestions.label: Give her room
suggestions.input: [MOVE] I step aside so she can leave if she wants, then lower my voice.

style.title: Emotional reconciliation
style.pacing: Slow down for apology, silence, and visible restraint.
style.turn_shape: Player action -> emotional landing -> boundary check -> trust shift.
style.branch_policy: Branch by emotional posture: honest repair, patient listening, or pressure failure.

opening_apology.title: The last stair
opening_apology.summary: She is close enough to hear one honest action before leaving.
opening_apology.gate: Choose a sincere action that does not block her.

honest_admission.title: Honest admission
honest_admission.summary: The player admits fear or avoidance without deflecting blame.
honest_admission.gate: A direct apology and score_action delta above zero.

trust_repair.title: Trust repair
trust_repair.summary: She pauses long enough to answer instead of leaving immediately.
trust_repair.gate: Relationship score 3 or higher with no pressure flag.

pressure_failure.title: Pressure failure
pressure_failure.summary: Pressuring her may keep her physically present while ending the conversation.
pressure_failure.gate: Blocking, demanding, or centering the player's pain.

success.title: She stays to talk
success.summary: Trust is repaired enough for the conversation to continue off the stairs.
success.gate: Relationship score 3 or higher with honest admission and no pressure flag.

panels.title: Station Overpass
panels.body: Rain hangs in the rail lights. She is almost at the stairs.

reactions.selection_policy: Use a restrained 绫波丽 (Ayanami Rei) expression that matches the latest visible emotional status and dialogue consequence. Update /ui/reactions/active through game_commit_turn after each player action.
